mapper.sql: select alarm_id, rule_id, device_id, scene_type, alarm_type, alarm_level, alarm_title, alarm_content, metric_snapshot, alarm_time, handle_status, handle_remark, handle_time, create_time from mon_alarm_record
mapper.insert: insert into mon_alarm_record (rule_id, device_id, scene_type, alarm_type, alarm_level, alarm_title, alarm_content, metric_snapshot, alarm_time, handle_status, handle_remark, handle_time, create_time) values (#{ruleId}, #{deviceId}, #{sceneType}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmLevel}, #{alarmTitle}, #{alarmContent}, #{metricSnapshot}, #{alarmTime}, #{handleStatus}, #{handleRemark}, #{handleTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from mon_alarm_record where alarm_id in #{id}
